isi.lyrics:
Lyric xeom boi - moonlit

Romanization

Midnight spills across my room
I’m alone with thoughts of you
Every reason I pretend
sounds more fragile in the end
I keep turning off the light
hoping darkness makes it right

All the things I try to hide
echo louder late at night

Under the moon, I make excuses
trying to fill these empty bruises
Say I’m fine but that’s not true
I break a little thinking of you
Moonlit excuses, all for you

Every silence has your name
nothing feels quite like the same
I replay the words I missed
every almost, every kiss
I keep lying to survive
maybe that’s how I stay alive

In the dark, the truth is clearer
and I feel you getting nearer

Under the moon, I make excuses
trying to fill these empty bruises
Say I’m fine but that’s not true
I break a little thinking of you
Moonlit excuses, all for you

isi.lyrics:
Lyric xeom boi - Midnight Radio

Romanization

Room light low and the curtains half drawn
Laptop glow is where my night lives on
You pop up laughing in a tiny square
Hair in a tangle and a crooked chair
You spill your day in a messy stream
Spinning little moments I could not have dreamed
I pause my playlist just to hear you talk
Let your voice set the tempo of my thoughts

I still do not know the way your city sounds
But I know how your laugh pulls my walls down

You feel like a midnight radio in my room
Soft steady rhythm cutting through the gloom
You move like a secret that the dark lets through
Hiding in the spaces between what we do
If this is fragile, I am careful too
Holding every pixel like it might be you
You turn my quiet into something bright
Just by showing up on the edge of night

I used to wear my headphones like a shield
Turn the volume up and never really feel
Now I leave one ear free just in case
You might send a link or a call my way
You show your window when the rain comes down
Cars on the glass make a gentle sound
I show my ceiling with the old paint crack
We both laugh saying we should repaint that

I do not need to name what this might be
I just like the way it rearranged me
